name: Nancy's Ice Cream Kolacky
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Vanilla; or French vanilla ice cream
Solo brand fruit filling (your desired flavor)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Hammond times (Cook of the week), 12/7/95
Preparation Time: 24 hours
1. Add flour to margarine and crumble in pastry blender.
2. Add ice cream to crumbled mixture and work into dough using dough hooks (or your hands if you don't have dough hooks; rubber gloves help reduce cold exposure).
3. When dough is smooth, shape into a ball and refrigerate overnight.
4. Roll dough to about 1/8-inch thickness on a floured surface.
5. Using the rim of a glass dipped in flour, cut out circles.
6. Place on cookie sheet and make a thumbprint in center of each.
7. Fill thumbprints with ½ teaspoon Solo filling.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar when cool.
